# Claude

Claude is an AI assistant created by Anthropic that can help with a wide variety of tasks including analysis, writing, math, coding, creative projects, and thoughtful conversation. Available through the web, mobile apps, API, and enterprise solutions for businesses of all sizes.

## Products

- [Product overview](https://claude.com/product/overview): Overview of Claude's capabilities and features  
- [Claude Code](https://claude.com/product/claude-code): Command-line coding tool for developers

## Features

- [Claude and Slack](https://claude.com/claude-and-slack): Use Claude directly in Slack for drafting, research, and meeting prep  
- [Claude in Excel](https://claude.com/claude-for-excel): Spreadsheet agent for formula explanations, scenario testing, and model building

## Pricing and plans

- [Pricing](https://claude.com/pricing): Complete pricing information for all Claude plans  
- [Max](https://claude.com/pricing/max): Premium plan with advanced capabilities and priority access  
- [Team](https://claude.com/pricing/team): Team plan collaboration features and organizational tools  
- [Enterprise](https://claude.com/pricing/enterprise): Enterprise plan features, use cases, and custom solutions

## Claude Developer Platform

- [Claude API](https://claude.com/platform/api): Claude API documentation and integration guide  
- [Developer documentation](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/home): Complete technical documentation and guides  
- [Developer newsletter](https://claude.com/newsletter/developers): Newsletter for developers

## Solutions by use case

- [AI agents](https://claude.com/solutions/agents): AI agents and automation solutions  
- [Coding](https://claude.com/solutions/coding): Development and programming assistance

## Solutions by industry

- [Customer support](https://claude.com/solutions/customer-support): Customer service automation  
- [Education](https://claude.com/solutions/education): Educational tools and learning support  
- [Financial services](https://claude.com/solutions/financial-services): Financial analysis and compliance tools  
- [Government](https://claude.com/solutions/government): Government and public sector solutions  
- [Life sciences](https://claude.com/solutions/life-sciences): Research synthesis, protocol generation, bioinformatics, and regulatory compliance for pharma and biotech

## Customer stories

- [Customer stories](https://claude.com/customers): Case studies and customer success stories

## Business and partnerships

- [Model Context Protocol](https://claude.com/partners/mcp): Model Context Protocol partnerships  
- [Powered by Claude](https://claude.com/partners/powered-by-claude): Integration partnerships  
- [Amazon Bedrock](https://claude.com/partners/amazon-bedrock): AWS Bedrock integration  
- [Google Cloud Vertex AI](https://claude.com/partners/google-cloud-vertex-ai): Google Cloud integration  
- [Service partners](https://claude.com/partners/services): Professional service partnerships

## Programs

- [Startup program](https://claude.com/programs/startups): Startup program benefits and application  
- [Campus program](https://claude.com/programs/campus): University and educational institution program

## Support & resources

- [Contact sales](https://claude.com/contact-sales): Enterprise sales contact information  
- [Blog](https://claude.com/blog): Product news and best practices for teams building with Claude.  
- [Use cases](https://claude.com/resources/use-cases): Learn how to turn research into presentations that stick. Claude helps translate findings into slide outlines and speaker notes that show what's compelling, how to structure the story, and which visuals would help—giving you the framework to build your presentation.  
- [Regional availability](https://claude.com/app-unavailable-in-region): Regional availability information  
- [Unsubscribe](https://claude.com/unsubscribe): Email unsubscribe
